assertion_results.text: Step 7 Case A creates standard remediation tasks for the current stream (rhtpa-2.2) with standard labels ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123'] and 'Depend' link to TC-8020
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 23-24: Task 1 labels are ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123']. Lines 87-89: Task 2 labels are ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123']. Post-creation actions for both tasks specify 'Link upstream/downstream task to TC-8020 with type "Depend"' (lines 75-76 and 133-136). Both tasks include 'Depends on: TC-8020 (parent tracking issue)' in Dependencies sections.

assertion_results.text: Step 7 Case B detects that stream rhtpa-2.1 is also affected but has no CVE Jira — creates proactive preemptive remediation tasks (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 138-143: 'Stream 2.1.x is affected (tokio 1.40.0 < 1.42.0) but has no CVE Jira. JQL search for sibling CVE Jiras with label CVE-2026-55123 in stream rhtpa-2.1 returned no results. Preemptive remediation tasks are created per Step 7 Case B.' cross-stream.md lines 19-23 confirm: 'Result: No sibling Vulnerability issues found. Specifically, no CVE Jira exists for stream rhtpa-2.1. This triggers Case B (preemptive remediation) for that stream.'

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks for stream rhtpa-2.1 include the 'security-preemptive' label alongside standard labels: ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive']
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md line 155: Preemptive Task 1 labels: ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive']. Line 225: Preemptive Task 2 labels: ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive']. cross-stream.md line 52 also confirms: 'Labels | ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123, **security-preemptive**' for both preemptive tasks.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks are linked to the originating CVE Jira TC-8020 with 'Related' link type (not 'Depend') because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md line 213: 'Link to TC-8020 with type **"Related"** (not "Depend" -- preemptive cross-stream linkage)' for Preemptive Task 1. Line 276-277: 'Link to TC-8020 with type **"Related"** (not "Depend" -- preemptive cross-stream linkage)' for Preemptive Task 2. cross-stream.md lines 56 and 73 also confirm 'Link to TC-8020 | **Related** (not Depend -- cross-stream preemptive)' for both preemptive tasks.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive task descriptions include a preemptive remediation prefix noting TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2) as the originating CVE
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 171-175: Preemptive Task 1 description includes '> **Preemptive remediation**: This task was created proactively from cross-stream\n> impact analysis of TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2).\n> No stream-specific CVE Jira exists yet for this stream.' Lines 240-244 show the same prefix for Preemptive Task 2. cross-stream.md lines 58-62 also quote this prefix for both tasks.
